description_long: This is an adult female figure with a modern, urban appearance, featuring a fitted short-sleeve top and a short skirt. She is wearing thigh-high stockings and high-heeled shoes, giving her a stylish and somewhat formal look suitable for city environments. Her arms are extended horizontally, and her posture is upright, suggesting a neutral or idle stance. The figure has a shoulder-length, layered hairstyle with a side part, and her facial features are clearly defined. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a slim build, and the shoes have pointed toes. The overall surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with realistic proportions and details.
description: A stylish adult woman in a fitted top, short skirt, thigh-high stockings, and high heels, standing upright with arms extended. She has a shoulder-length, layered hairstyle and a slim build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fitted top, skirt, stockings, high heels, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, top, skirt, and stockings, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, hairstyle, and the side of the skirt and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve fitted top, short skirt, thigh-high stockings, high-heeled shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length layered hair with a side part
